title: Wrong result produced when left joining information_schema tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount REAL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 1, 100.50), (2, 2, NULL);
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Left joining information_schema tables produces wrong results
